notableEvents.label: Mark Vientos GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mark Vientos grounds into a double play, third baseman Austin Riley to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Juan Soto out at 2nd. Mark Vientos out at 1st.
